creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from "O. Hartmann" <ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de> -----

From: "O. Hartmann" <ohartman@zedat.fu-berlin.de>
To: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>

Installed missing scripts phpie and php-config by hand, then 
installation of phpldapadmin works as expected. Did not digg deeper into 
the problem, maybe a missing entry in install script.

Regards,
Oliver
